zh.Glemsford,Suff,Eng: 英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德

zh.Glemsford, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Scott於大約1478年出生在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，他的父親William Scott30歲，母親Clemence25歲。他於大約1500年與Joan Scott在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1529年在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Scott于大约1478年出生在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德时，他的父亲William Scott30岁，母亲Clemence25岁。他于大约1500年与Joan Scott在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1529年在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Scott was born about 1478, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, his father, William Scott, was 30 and his mother, Clemence, was 25. He married Joan Scott about 1500, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1529, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Scott est né environ 1478, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Scott, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Clemence, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Scott environ 1500, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1529, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Scott um 1478 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Scott 30 und seine Mutter Clemence 25. Er hat um 1500 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Joan Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1529 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Scott è nato il circa 1478 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Scott, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Clemence, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Scott circa 1500, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1529, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Scottが約1478年にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで生まれた時，父William Scottは30歳，母Clemenceは25歳であった。約1500年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでJoan Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1529年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Scott(이)가 대략 1478년 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Scott(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Clemence(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Joan Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Scott nasceu aproximadamente 1478, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Scott, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Clemence, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Scott aproximadamente 1500, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1529, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Scott родился около 1478 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Scott было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemence, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Scott около 1500 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1529 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.
